content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the car well-positioned near center, and the curve appears to continue moderately.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 51, target = 51 + 5 = 56
- Waypoint 56: (4.2557, 3.1701)
- Car position: (5.0397, 2.7283)
- Bearing = atan2(3.1701 - 2.7283, 4.2557 - 5.0397) = atan2(0.4418, -0.7840)
- = 180 - atan2(0.4418, 0.7840) = 180 - 29.40° = 150.60°
- Current heading: 163.10°
- Delta = 150.60 - 163.10 = -12.50° → right correction needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, delta to waypoint 56 is -12.5° confirming moderate right turn needed, applying -10 steering at 1.5 speed since delta is in the 5-15° range closer to 15°.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long straight section heading ~180° (due west) along y≈2.77",
    "Right-curving section spans waypoints 48-58, delta consistently -12 to -20°",
    "Car is consistently ~0.04-0.17m left of center — slight left bias throughout",
    "Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves",
    "Use steering_angle=0 for delta <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections",
    "Track width ~0.76m — 0.04m left of center is nearly centered, good position",
    "Heading is ~163° (west-southwest), track curves right (south) ahead",
    "Delta around -12° in this section — use -10 steering at 1.5 speed",
    "Previous -15 steering at delta -16° was slightly aggressive; -10 at -12° is better",
    "Waypoints 51-58 show gradual right curve continuing, moderate correction needed"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.2215, 5.1614, 5.1078, 5.0397],
    "y": [2.6307, 2.6592, 2.6889, 2.7283],
    "yaw": [175.900, 170.748, 166.911, 163.103]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -12.5,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -10.0
}
```
